tasks.title: SDK v0.2 — event subscriptions (watchEvent wrappers)

Full TypeScript types with filter support (owner filter for ProjectCreated, projectId filter for VersionPushed). All helpers re-exported from sdk/src/index.ts.

tasks.title: SDK v0.2 — batch reads (Multicall3 integration)
tasks.description: Added Multicall3-powered batch reads: batchGetProjects(), batchGetVersions(), batchGetFees(), batchGetProjectsWithVersions(). New module: sdk/src/multicall.ts. BatchResult<T> wrapper with success/data/error shape. All helpers re-exported from index.ts.
tasks.result: SDK tests: 227 → 255 (+28 new multicall tests). All 255 passing. Contracts: 159/159 passing.

tasks.title: Full LitEncryptionProvider test coverage — encryption.ts 52% → 100%
tasks.description: encryption.ts had only 7 PassthroughEncryption tests. Lines 55–102 (LitEncryptionProvider class: constructor, connect, encrypt, decrypt, encryptForToken, decryptWithToken) were completely uncovered. Added 16 new tests covering all V1 stub behaviors (all methods throw EncryptionError with V2 message). Fixed duplicate const declarations in test file.
tasks.result: SDK tests: 255 → 271 (+16). All 271 passing. encryption.ts: 52.94% → 100% stmts/branch/funcs/lines. Overall SDK coverage: 93.48% → 94.24%. Contracts: 159/159 passing.

tasks.title: Plug branch coverage gaps — 96.37% → 99.2% branches
tasks.description: No pending tasks. Audited all uncovered branches: (1) multicall.ts coerceResult non-Error error path (string/number/undefined); (2) ProjectRegistry extractProjectIdFromLogs catch block for invalid BigInt topic; (3) InkdClient extractAllTokenIdsFromLogs + extractInscriptionIndexFromLogs + extractTokenIdFromLogs catch blocks; (4) arweave.ts dead-branch fix: data instanceof Uint8Array always true for Buffer|Uint8Array (Buffer extends Uint8Array), replaced with Buffer.isBuffer() so both branches are reachable and covered.
tasks.result: SDK tests: 271 → 282 (+11). All 282 passing. Branch coverage: 96.37% → 99.2%. multicall.ts + ProjectRegistry.ts + arweave.ts all at 100% branch coverage. Contracts: 159/159 passing.
